1.name: Restore Humanitas
1.description: itas ( 1st ): Restore lost Humanity through meditation

2.name: [2] Banishing Sign of Thoth (1st)
2.description: Use a mystic gesture to ward off supernatural powers

2.name: Banishing Sign of Thoth
2.description: hoth (1st): Use a mystic gesture to ward off supernatural powers

3.name: [3] Gift of Apis (1st)
3.description: Gain as much sustenance from animal blood as human blood

3.name: Gift of Apis
3.description: Apis (1st): Gain as much sustenance from animal blood as human blood

4.name: [4] Pillar of Osiris (1st)
4.description: Create a mystical center that allows proper meditation and lowers the difficulty of supernatural powers

4.name: Pillar of Osiris
4.description: iris (1st): Create a mystical center that allows proper meditation and lowers the difficulty of supernatural powers

5.name: [5] Paradox (1st)
5.description: Speak a word that overwhelms others with bliss and makes it harder for them to harm you

5.name: Paradox
5.description: adox (1st): Speak a word that overwhelms others with bliss and makes it harder for them to harm you

6.name: [6] Boon of Anubis (1st)
6.description: Ensure that a mortal cannot be Embraced and will survive the attempt

6.name: Boon of Anubis
6.description: ubis (1st): Ensure that a mortal cannot be Embraced and will survive the attempt

7.name: [7] Bring Forth the Dawn (1st)
7.description: Force vampires to sleep as if it were day

7.name: Bring Forth the Dawn
7.description: Dawn (1st): Force vampires to sleep as if it were day

8.name: [8] Mummification Ritual (1st)
8.description: Put a ghoul or vampire into prolonged torpor

8.description: tual (1st): Put a ghoul or vampire into prolonged torpor

9.name: [10] Rebirth (1st)
9.description: Perform a ritual that brings a Child of Osiris back from Final Death

9.description: Perform a ritual that allows the Child of Osiris to temporarily walk in daylight
